title: Winter (disambiguation)
content:
'''Winter''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Winter]]''', a cold [[season]] on some worlds
*'''[[Winter's Edge]]''', a location
*'''[[Winter's Heart]]''', a holiday

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Winter/Legends|Winter]]''', a cold season

===Individuals===
*'''[[Winter Celchu]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative and wife of [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]]
*'''[[Trep Winterrs]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]

===Holidays===
*The '''[[Winter Fete/Legends|Winter Fete]]''', a holiday in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]
*'''[[Winterfest]]''', a holiday of the [[Witches of Dathomir]]

===Other===
*'''[[Bitter Winter]]''', a disease
*The '''[[Winter Palace]]''', home of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] clan

==Real world==
===Works===
*"'''[[A Bitter Winter]]'''", a short story
*"'''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)#Episode_list|Freedom's Winter]]'''", the first episode of [[National Public Radio|NPR's]] [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back Radio Drama'']]

===People===
*'''[[David Winters]]''', the choreographer for ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''
*'''[[Time Winters]]''', an actor

{{Disambig}}

|de=Winter
|fi=Winter (täsmennyssivu)
}}
